rationale: 1810 marks the start of the Chilean republican period and the canonical lower bound of the project's historical panel. Pre-1865 censuses (Egaña 1813, 1835, 1843, 1854) are included with methodological caveat flags rather than excluded; affected cells carry [pre_1865_census=<year>;caveats=<descriptor>] notes prefixes. 1990 marks the democratic transition; post-1990 data is digitally-native and structurally different from the historical archive (INE microdata, BC APIs, ministry datasets), deferred to a future window-extension phase rather than retired.
applies_to: chile_master_data.csv (notes prefix [out_of_scope=post_1990] for >1990 cells; [pre_1865_census=...;caveats=...] for pre-1865 census-attributed cells)
scripts/detect_anomalies.py (skip out-of-scope cells; pre_1865_census cells stay in-scope with caveat surfaced in anomaly notes)
